description: One production run on a machine within a shift — the sequence unit for shift_comparison (View 4) and the normalization base. Reconstructed by a central run-builder from machine_events (in-cycle/counter/program/tool signals) + order-start events; not edge-sourced. Carries technical_output (Soll-/Standardmenge = ideal cycle time x runtime) as the volume weight and planned baseline. NOTE: no run-builder producer exists yet (2026-07-21) — View 4 runs on the seed fixture.

attributes.name: shift
attributes.description: Shift id the run is attributed to (S1/S2/S3). Denormalized; primary read by view-engine (coalesce(sh.shift_id, run.shift)).

attributes.name: order_no
attributes.description: Denormalized order reference; read directly by view-engine kg-source Q_SHIFT_RUNS (run.order_no). Graph re-link to ProductionOrder is open consolidation work (see plan).

attributes.name: sequence_index
attributes.description: Position of this run in the shift's sequence

attributes.name: setup_before
attributes.description: True if a changeover/setup preceded this run

attributes.name: technical_output
attributes.description: Soll-/Standardmenge (ideal cycle time x runtime) — volume weight + planned baseline

attributes.name: produced
attributes.description: Good parts produced in the run

attributes.name: events
attributes.description: Per-dimension event totals for this run (sum, NOT a rate), keyed by dimension. Read by view-engine composer.volumeWeightedCell (r.events[dimension]).

relationships.description: Machine the run ran on. NOTE: view-engine currently queries RAN_ON — a code drift that must be changed to ON_MACHINE (repo canon).
Shift the run is attributed to
Next run in the shift sequence (timeline link)

isa95.note: Run actuals of a job run = JobResponse
